text: Weight 14.2 kg was recorded at the 45th percentile for age, with a height-for-age z-score of 0.4. The infant walks independently. Feeding history: exclusively breastfed until 6 months. Anterior fontanelle open and soft was noted on exam. This synthetic fixture is descriptive only and does not compute or infer percentile or z-score values against growth chart standards.
